summary: Customer Portal Mobile/PWA Hardening Pass - All CSS/layout fixes verified. Tested at 375px (iPhone SE) and 390px (iPhone 14/15) viewports. All 11 test cases passed: customer login, /my-cases list with case cards, /my-cases/:caseId detail with all 5 tabs, back navigation, BottomTabBar visibility/no-overlap, and horizontal tab scrolling.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: lead_21668ed1ecd9 (Anniversary case) with shares, payments, messages, timeline
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile/PWA hardening pass complete. Three CSS fixes verified: (1) CustomerCaseList.js hero section no longer has double safe-area padding (line 75 has pt-6 pb-8, no safe-top class), (2) index.css has .has-bottom-bar utility at line 648-651, (3) CustomerCaseDetail.js line 185 uses inline style WebkitOverflowScrolling instead of invalid Tailwind class. Customer portal tested at 375px and 390px viewports - all flows working.

features_verified.my_cases_page_loads: PASS - Shows 4 case cards (Anniversary, 3x General Enquiry)
features_verified.case_detail_page_loads: PASS - Shows all 5 tabs (Shared, Payments, Messages, Timeline, Contact)
features_verified.back_navigation: PASS - Back button returns to /my-cases list
features_verified.shared_tab: PASS - Shows share cards with Respond button (2 respond buttons found)
features_verified.payments_tab: PASS - Shows payment summary and payment history
features_verified.messages_tab: PASS - Shows chat thread with compose input and send button
features_verified.timeline_tab: PASS - Shows timeline events with dates and descriptions
features_verified.contact_rm_tab: PASS - Shows RM info (Ravi Sharma) and action buttons
features_verified.tab_bar_horizontal_scroll: PASS - Tab bar has overflow-x-auto and hide-scrollbar classes
features_verified.bottom_tab_bar_on_list: PASS - BottomTabBar visible on /my-cases, Requests tab highlighted
features_verified.no_bottom_tab_bar_on_detail: PASS - BottomTabBar NOT visible on case detail (intentional focused view)
features_verified.has_bottom_bar_class: PASS - Content area has .has-bottom-bar class for bottom padding

css_fixes_verified.hero_safe_area_fix: PASS - CustomerCaseList.js line 75: Hero has pt-6 pb-8, NO safe-top class (Header handles safe-area)
css_fixes_verified.has_bottom_bar_css: PASS - index.css lines 647-652: .has-bottom-bar utility with padding-bottom: calc(50px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom) + 16px)
css_fixes_verified.webkit_overflow_scrolling_fix: PASS - CustomerCaseDetail.js line 185: Uses inline style={{ WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch' }} instead of invalid Tailwind class

mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay is in TEST MODE. Payments are simulated via /simulate endpoint.
